problem id: f370fab8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01110101 -> 10011010
  10011011 -> 00101101
  11011111 -> 10001111
  00111101 -> 10111110
  11011000 -> 01101100
  01111111 -> 11011111
  11111000 -> 01111100
  11000111 -> 10000011
  11001111 -> 10000111

query: 11110001
predicted answer: 01011000
